etymology.description: 山(山) (shān, "mountain") + 隽(隽) (juàn, "outstanding") = semantic mountain + phonetic juàn -> high and steep
etymology.interpretation: The character 崾 represents the concept of being high and steep by combining the semantic component 山(山) (shān, "mountain"), symbolizing elevation, with the phonetic component 隽(隽) (juàn, "outstanding") to convey the pronunciation and reinforce the lofty meaning.
